questions.question: What is the purpose of a constructor?
keyPoints: To set up an object's data members

questions.question: What is the purpose of a destructor?
What is a copy constructor?
keyPoints: A constructor that creates a copy of an existing object

questions.question: Explain the purpose of constructors and destructors in C++. Provide examples to illustrate their use.
Compare and contrast constructors and destructors in C++. How are they similar? How are they different?
keyPoints: Constructors and destructors are both special member functions
Constructors initialize objects, while destructors clean up objects
Constructors can have parameters, while destructors cannot

questions.question: Explain the concept of constructor overloading in C++. Provide examples to illustrate its use.
keyPoints: Constructor overloading allows multiple constructors with different parameters

questions.question: Explain the concept of destructor syntax in C++. Provide examples to illustrate its use.
